item.title: 👍💵Jake García - Latino Community Fund of Washington State
item.description: Jake García signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Latino Community Fund of Washington State. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Patrick Stickney - WA Office of Equity
item.description: Patrick Stickney signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WA Office of Equity.

item.description: Kati Durkin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Federation of State Employees.

item.title: House Passes Ortiz-Self bill expanding multilingual access / Cámara aprueba proyecto de Ortiz-Self que amplía el acceso multilingüe – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "House Passes Ortiz-Self bill expanding multilingual access / Cámara aprueba proyecto de Ortiz-Self que amplía el acceso multilingüe – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.
